case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-416 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For katcha peshi. 2. For hearing of MA-4258/2016 10.11.2016. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G = On last date of hearing, the matter was adjourned only in the interest of justice with certain observations. The nature of controversy between the parties is that of matrimonial and respondent No.2-Mst.Raheela has a decree of maintenance in her favour, which has been impugned in the present proceedings. On last date of hearing, interim restraining order operating in favour of the petitioner was vacated. It appears that petitioner has lost his interest to proceed further with the matter, especially after vacation of stay, therefore, the present constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Shahid
